name: DoIP_SetProtocol
title: DoIP_SetProtocol
description: Sets protocol version used in DoIP PDUs.

parameters.name: protocolID
parameters.description: 1: Draft version (2010)2: First released ISO standard 2012 (ISO 13400-2 first edition 2012-06-01)

description: This value can also be configured globally on the diagnostics configuration dialog, DoIP Main Settings.
example.code:
// Use early draft version of the protocol
DoIP_SetProtocol(1);
